name: AD Mixtape · Some For Harry: A Haruomi Hosono Companion
description: “It was really pure art. Pure art. Anyway, producing great works was the ultimate goal; we had eyes for nothing else. We heard nothing else. We still had no sense of society. There was no sense of the masses.” - Haruomi Hosono Here now, “Some for Harry,” a celebration and glance at Haruomi Hosono: bass
